product: Lakebase is now generally available with compliance security profile
tagline: Lakebase is now generally available for workspaces with the compliance security profile when the compliance standard is set to HIPAA, C5, TISAX, or None.
what_it_does: Lakebase is now generally available for workspaces with the compliance security profile when the compliance standard is set to HIPAA, C5, TISAX, or None. Lakebase Postgres provides data protection features to help secure your databases and control access to critical data. These features enable you to protect production environments and establish secure network connectivity between your applications and databases.
why_it_matters: Postgres clients connecting from outside the workspace also require inbound Private Link for performance intensive services.
key_takeaway: Lakebase is now generally available for workspaces with the compliance security profile when the compliance standard is set to HIPAA, C5, TISAX, or None.
